title: The Al question no one wants to ask
description:
A documentary about AI, science, propaganda, friendship, and democracy.

Hope you like it - it took a minute to put together :)

Made with the incredible @SciencePetr 

Petr's reading list:

**BOOKS**
Why Trust Science?  - Naomi Oreskes
Why machines learn —  Anil Ananthaswamy
Empire of AI — Karen Hao
Life 3.0 — Max Tegmark
The Lord Of The Rings

**PAPERS & REPORTS**
https://humanstatement.org
https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.adn0117
https://arxiv.org/pdf/2306.12001
https://internationalaisafetyreport.org
https://www.vatican.va/content/leo-xiv/en/encyclicals/documents/20260515-magnifica-humanitas.html

Cam's List:

**BOOKS**
Pedagogy of the Oppressed -Paolo Freire

**DOCUMENTARIES**
Whose Progress (where a lot of those Tony Benn clips are from)
https://archive.org/details/newtechnologywhoseprogress


Thanks for watching :)

title: I truly hope I'm just being paranoid about this
description:
Australia just banned social media for children under 16. Now what?

Great sources:
https://www.eff.org/ 
https://www.crikey.com.au/author/cam-wilson/ 

There's a lot in this video, so in case you find you want to revisit a section:

2:33 - definition
     3:59 - the best arguments FOR the ban
     8:04 - the best arguments AGAINST the ban
13:43 - "framing the debate" as narrative control
17:23 - how to better structure your own thoughts on this issue
     18:50 - how to better structure your own thoughts on social media regulation
     19:56 - how to better structure your own thoughts on digital surveillience
22:33 - changes that i would like to see on the internet, including 3 regulation suggestions

Thanks for watching :)
